response: Define the study's objectives to ensure data collection aligns with data analysis goals. Collect data from various sources to support data interpretation in the field. Use standardized tools to gather data accurately and maintain data consistency. Store data securely to protect data integrity during the study period. Analyze data patterns to identify data trends relevant to the research question. Validate data entries to confirm data reliability before further data processing. Share data findings with stakeholders to ensure data transparency and data utility. Review data outcomes to refine data strategies for future epidemiological data studies.
